arts.ttl: Roma vs. Como: a match between two in-form sides
arts.sum: Roma have won their last three league matches without conceding a goal, while the Giallorossi have not achieved four successes in a row in Serie A since the period between July and August 2020. Roma have lost their last two matches against Como in Serie A (0-2 both on 25 January 2003 and last 15 December), the only time the Lombards have lost successive games against Capitoline club in the top-flight.

arts.ttl: Milan interested in Como boss Cesc Fabregas
arts.sum: Serie A giants Milan are interested in the possibility of hiring Como boss Cesc Fabregas in the future. La Gazzetta dello Sport have reported today that while Sergio Conceicao’s position…
